user.title: Connect to Firewalla
user.description: Set up Firewalla integration. You need to create a personal access token in your Firewalla MSP account.

data_description.subdomain: This is the unique subdomain for your MSP account (the part before .firewalla.net)
data_description.api_token: To get your API token, go to your Firewalla MSP account > Account Settings > Create New Token.

error.auth: Authentication failed. Please check your subdomain and API token.

abort.already_configured: This Firewalla instance is already configured.

init.title: Firewalla Entities and Settings
init.description: Enable the following entities and metrics.

data_description.enable_flows: Display data flows on devices - high HA recorder/DB load!
data_description.enable_traffic: Display traffic metrics on devices - high HA recorder/DB load!
